'''βàöch-v-s-sh''' ('''kachavseshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waggle|waggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waggle|waggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöch-v-s-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kachavseshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichavseshoko|thichavseshoko]] || [[word:jichavseshoko|jichavseshoko]] || [[word:shichavseshoko|shichavseshoko]] || [[word:kichavseshoko|kichavseshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochavseshoko|thochavseshoko]] || [[word:jochavseshoko|jochavseshoko]] || [[word:shochavseshoko|shochavseshoko]] || [[word:kochavseshoko|kochavseshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
